prompt: Create a polished vertical anime-style fashion illustration of a young woman standing on an indoor escalator in a bright modern shopping mall or transit atrium. She wears a black newsboy cap with a glossy band, shoulder-length light brown hair peeking out from under the cap, long dangling earrings, a crisp white short-sleeve blouse with puff sleeves and a large tied bow at the collar, a high-waisted black pleated midi skirt, and a small black quilted shoulder bag with a gold chain strap. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square privacy blur while the rest of the image remains sharp. Pose her full body from slightly below eye level, one hand relaxed at her side and the other lightly resting on the escalator handrail, elegant and calm. The background is a spacious glass-roofed interior with diagonal steel beams, marble or dark stone wall panels, warm wooden ceiling accents, glass railings, and a pair of parallel escalators receding behind her; include subtle distant silhouettes of people on an upper level. Use realistic anime rendering with clean linework, soft skin shading, detailed fabric folds, glossy reflections on metal escalator rails, bright early-summer daylight streaming through the skylight, airy high-key lighting, shallow depth of field, fashionable urban outing mood, portrait orientation, high detail.
